name: Chaos Kitchen
title: Chaos Kitchen | Weekly Arcade - Free Cooking Game Online
description: Play Chaos Kitchen free online. Run a chaotic kitchen, fulfill orders, survive chaos events, and become a master chef! No download required.
keywords: cooking game, kitchen game, time management game, chaos kitchen, free game, browser game, restaurant game
tips: Read the full order before starting — multi-step orders are easy to mess up if you rush
Handle chaos events immediately — ignoring them causes cascading failures
Batch similar orders together to save time on ingredient prep
Keep your counter clear by serving completed orders immediately
Upgrade your kitchen tools between rounds to handle harder orders
howToPlay: Read customer orders and prepare dishes by selecting the right ingredients in the correct sequence. Serve orders before the timer runs out. Survive random chaos events like fires, spills, and equipment failures. Complete all orders to advance to harder levels.
